diagrams.name: System Architecture
diagrams.description: High-level data flow from RF input through transcription to browser
diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[RTL-SDR Blog V4] -->|USB| B[rtl_fm subprocess]
    C[LiveATC / NOAA streams] -->|HTTP| D[ffmpeg subprocess]
    B -->|16kHz PCM| E[InputSource Abstraction]
    D -->|16kHz PCM| E
    E -->|whisper_pipe| F[Transcriber - Hailo-8L / faster-whisper]
    E -->|audio_pipe| G[Audio Router - HTTP WAV Stream]
    F -->|transcript_queue| H[Socket.IO Push]
    G -->|/audio-stream| I[Browser Audio Player]
    H -->|WebSocket| J[Browser Transcript Feed]
    I --> K[ravenSDR Console UI]
    J --> K

diagrams.name: Input Mode Selection
diagrams.description: Auto-detection flow for SDR vs Web Stream mode
diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[Startup] --> B{rtl_test -t}
    B -->|exit 0| C[SDR Mode]
    B -->|exit != 0| D[Web Stream Mode]
    C --> E[Tuner - rtl_fm]
    D --> F[StreamSource - ffmpeg]
    E --> G[InputSource PCM Queue]
    F --> G

diagrams.name: Thread Model
diagrams.description: Four concurrent threads in the Flask application
diagrams.mermaid:
graph LR
    T1[Thread 1: Flask/SocketIO Main] --> HTTP[HTTP + WebSocket]
    T2[Thread 2: _read_loop] --> PCM[Read rtl_fm/ffmpeg stdout]
    T3[Thread 3: _inference_loop] --> WHI[Whisper on PCM chunks]
    T4[Thread 4: signal_meter_loop] --> RMS[Sample RMS every 500ms]
